text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, May 11. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Prepping school lunches for the week. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's organize the menu. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Good planning. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, The lawn mower is having issues starting. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good call on checking that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. I've got the schedule covered. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. We are meeting Dave and Kim at a new restaurant. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Neighborhood connections are fun. Enjoy! I've set reservation alerts and mapped the route to Plano. Have a great time!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Personal time is valuable. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that putting together our grocery list. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. It helps to plan ahead.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Meal planning saves so much time. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Toddlers are full of energy. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Checking on some house maintenance items. The living room lights aren't responding to commands. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. The smart-home bridge needs a manual power cycle. Unplug it for 10 seconds. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the weekend activities for the kids. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Great progress. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Planning a street block party soon. My golf driving was terrible but had a great catch-up. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Neighborhood connections are fun. Jake is a great friend. Did you discuss the Naperville trip? I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Got some yard work done and cleaned up. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
